modal.title: Text & UI Size
modal.reading_text_hint: Affects post body and discussion titles.
modal.interface_size_hint: Affects navigation, buttons, and other UI elements.

settings.text_size_help: Sets the sitewide default for post body and title text. Users can override this with the Font Size button in the header.
settings.ui_size_help: Sets the sitewide default for navigation, buttons, and UI elements. Users can override this with the Font Size button in the header.
settings.preview_text: The quick brown fox jumps over the lazy dog. This sample reading text scales with the setting above.
